titleStmt.title: SII 29.129: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 129. (A.R. No. B. 621 of 1961-62.) KERGĀL, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: It registers a land grant for the offerings of god Trimūrti in order to expiate the sin of killing a Brahmana. The grant was made probably by Huṇisemane Govinda and Kuyalamane Kṛishṇa when mahāpradhāna Maleya daṁṇāyaka was administering the region from Bārahkanyāpura.

Since the record is damaged not much information is available regarding the murder of a Brahmana and the responsibility of the donors in this regard. At the end the record informs that the donors were granted with 2 gadyāṇā cash and probably with some tax relief.
It is dated in the cyclic year Sarvajitu, Vaishākha, ba. 5 [Vrishabha māsa 4] Monday. The given tithi corresponds with [Śaka 1269] 1347 A.D., April 30.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu sarvajitu saṁvatsarada
vaiśākha bahuḷa 5 vṛṣabha māsa 4 neya
sōmavāradaṁdu śrī manumahāpradhā
naṁ maleya daṁṇāyakaru bārahakanyāpuradarama
neya ḷidu pradhānaru
muṁtāgi ra karu
huṇise
yamaneya gōviṁdanū kuyala maneya kriṣṇa
brahmahatyā dōṣa parihā
rārthavāgi kēṟiyaluḷaṁthā trimūrtige 8
hāneyakkiya naivēdya naḍava hāṁge pāḷu
sa yeṁba mū(vara) 12 mūḍe
baruva bāḷanu dhārāpūrvakavāgi Eṟedu
koṭṭaru kuyalamane kriṣṇarige ga 2 pā
ḷu huṇise maneyagōviṁdarige ga2
nū barsi koṭṭaru Ā 2 manege ve biḍusa
lla . śrī
Digital edition of SII 29.129 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
